title: Wham 7.01 Rectangular 30cm Home Studio Storage Basket (Grey)
features: High Quality Rectangular Studio Storage Basket in Duck Egg Blue, Pink, Grey or White
Versatile Storage Solution for Home or Office
Integrated Handle for Easy Movement of Basket
Nestable Inside Each Other When Empty
Minimum Internal Size: H9.5cm x W8cm x L28cm, Maximum External Size: H10cm x W10cm x L30cm
description: Product Description These sleek and modern looking Slim Rectangular Grey Studio Basket from Wham are incredibly versatile. Suitable for displaying your craft accessories, bathroom toiletries, makeup, cleaning and laundry products or stationery. The baskets are made from a high quality plastic, the basket's finish ensures that it blends in with any home decor whilst its minimalistic design means it won't look out of place whichever room you locate it in. An integrated handle aids easy access to slide the basket when stored on a shelf. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
